message:
test(wal): add crash recovery and durability tests (bd-14m.4)

Add 7 tests covering WAL crash recovery scenarios:
- Truncated WAL recovers committed prefix only
- Corrupt frame payload detected on reopen via checksum chain
- Multi-commit recovery stops at first corrupted frame
- Restart checkpoint bounds WAL growth (100 frames → 0)
- WAL header corruption detected on open
- Empty WAL reopen succeeds cleanly
- Uncommitted frame survives but is not marked as commit

All 229 fsqlite-wal tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
